name: LinkedIn
signal: Healthcare Models Shifting Towards Outcomes-Based Payments
brief: The healthcare industry is exploring radical shifts, such as paying GPs for keeping patients healthy rather than for appointments, using capitation and outcomes-based contracts. This highlights a move towards value-based care models, incentivizing preventative health and long-term patient well-being. The technology enabling this shift is crucial for future healthcare delivery.
